title: You Don’t Have an RCA Problem. You Have an Implementation Problem
excerpt: Investigations only create value when recommendations are implemented, verified, and shown to reduce recurrence. Otherwise RCA becomes documentation, not learning.

title: Fixing the First Failure is Valuable. Preventing the Next One is Priceless.
excerpt: Shared learnings multiply the value of investigations by applying proven solutions across fleets, sites and portfolios before repeat failures occur.

title: The Reliability Learning Cycle
excerpt: FMEA, maintenance strategies, RCA and institutional learning are not separate activities. They form a continuous cycle that compares expectations against reality and updates the assumptions that govern future decisions.
